headline: Jade Global Named Workday Partner
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., April 30, 2026--Jade Global, a premier global provider of digital transformation services and solutions, today announced it has signed a partnership agreement with Workday (NASDAQ: WDAY), a leading provider of solutions to help organizations manage their people and money. This partnership will bring deep domain expertise across industries, including manufacturing, High-tech, healthcare, and retail. headline: Cresta Names Sequoia's Doug Leone as Board Chair, Carl Eschenbach Rejoins Board as Growth Accelerates
summary: Cresta, the unified customer experience AI platform for human and AI agents, today announced that Doug Leone, Partner at Sequoia Capital and longtime Cresta board member, has been named Chairman of its Board of Directors. The company also announced that Carl Eschenbach, former CEO of Workday and current Sequoia Partner, is rejoining the board as the company enters its next phase of growth.

headline: High Growth Tech Stocks in the US Market to Watch
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, yet it has shown a significant rise of 28% over the past year with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. In this context, identifying high growth tech stocks becomes crucial as they have the potential to capitalize on these favorable conditions and contribute positively to an investment portfolio.

headline: Top Growth Stocks With Notable Insider Ownership
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, but it is up 28% over the past year with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. In this environment, growth companies with high insider ownership can be particularly appealing as they often indicate strong confidence from those who know the business best.
